data.content: Plan complete for searchable model selection in setup.sh. Threshold-based dispatch: lists >15 models get a search-then-select loop via new _filter_models() and _collect_models_searchable() functions. Small lists keep existing numbered menu (no regression). grep -i for fast case-insensitive filtering. Count display shows "N of M models". Tests: unit test for _filter_models via bash execFile, integration test for full search flow. All changes in scripts/setup.sh + one new test file. Low-medium complexity, no external deps.
